default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Final technical check-in before launch.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Launch Proceeding:** The team is confident in the build's stability and will proceed with launch, focusing on system monitoring and minor fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [**Performance Bottleneck:** The `/sources` endpoint is slow (up to 22s) for workspaces with many prompts. This is not a launch blocker, as it only affects existing, high-usage customers.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [**Email Complication:** Welcome emails via Customer.io are blocked by a regulatory issue (EU server for US users). Jason will send emails manually as a workaround.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [**Intercom Automation:** Stevie will add an auto-reply and a proactive pop-up message to improve the user support experience.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)

## Topics

### System Health & Performance

  - [**Sentry Errors:**](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
      - [`maximum call stack exceeded`: A new frontend error (likely an infinite loop) appeared after the analytics deployment. Not user-facing; requires monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
      - [Onboarding template errors: Resolved. Caused by a temporary database replication lag.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [Inertia error in `context_controller`: A single, non-reproducible event.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [**`/sources` Endpoint Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
      - [**Problem:** The endpoint is slow for some users (up to 22s).](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
      - [**Cause:** Aggregation of data from many prompts in high-usage workspaces.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [**Status:** Not a launch blocker. The team will monitor feedback from existing customers.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [**Webhook Failure:**](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
      - [**Problem:** A recent deploy of the "internal URL" feature broke the flow webhook.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
      - [**Cause:** Cloudflare's security rules blocked the webhook path.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
      - [**Resolution:** Reverted the deploy. The team will whitelist the webhook path to prevent future issues.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)

### Launch Readiness & Blockers

  - [**Customer.io Welcome Emails:**](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [**Problem:** A regulatory issue (EU server for US users) blocks automated welcome emails.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [**Resolution:** Jason will send emails manually. This is not a launch blocker.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [**Onboarding Enhancements:**](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
      - [**Subcategory Cap:** Estevão will deploy a cap on subcategories to prevent performance issues from excessive data.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
      - [**Personal Email Block:** A block for personal email domains is live. The generic error message from Clerk (`this email is blocked`) may cause user confusion and support tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [**Intercom Support:**](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [**Goal:** Improve support responsiveness and proactively help users.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [**Actions:** Stevie will add an automated welcome message and a proactive pop-up ("Are you running into trouble?").](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)

### Team Focus & Work Completed

  - [**Jose:** Monitor system stability; passively work on the probing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [**Pedro:**](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
      - [Added user email to Sentry reports for better context.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
      - [Moved context and percentage generation to background jobs.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
      - [Fixed overview stats tab-switching bug.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [**Estevão:**](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
      - [Refactored the complex onboarding "brand" step into simpler controllers.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
      - [Will cap subcategories and competitors in onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
      - [Will hold off on non-critical UI merges until after launch.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [**Stevie:**](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
      - [Coordinate on the Customer.io email issue.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
      - [Set up Intercom automation.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [Invite the team to PostHog.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jose:** Monitor system stability; passively work on probing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [**Estevão:** Deploy the onboarding cap for subcategories and competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [**Stevie:** Set up Intercom auto-reply and proactive pop-up message.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [**Jason:** Send welcome emails manually as a workaround for the Customer.io issue.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [**All:** Focus on system monitoring and minor fixes; avoid major deploys or database migrations today.](https://fathom.video/share/CHZhgPqJnkxybRpv9fgWLsGBQz4WYzHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)

action_items.description: Deploy onboarding cap on competitors/subcategories to prod
Tag Stevie in Customer.io thread re: EU instance/welcome emails
Keep plate clear; monitor systems; handle issues
Call Yusuf re: @checkthat.ai inbox for Jason/Marcel
